parametrized_description: Find the shortest Hamiltonian cycle visiting all n cities exactly once. Uses the MTZ formulation augmented with the Two-City Detour Elimination cut (Version 1, EC3): eliminates infeasible two-city detours through the depot among any pair of non-depot cities.

c.description: Travel cost from city i to city j

x.description: 1 if the tour goes directly from city i to city j, 0 otherwise

u.description: MTZ position of city i in the tour; u[0] is fixed to 1 to anchor the depot

constraints.description: Each city has exactly one outgoing arc in the tour.
constraints.formulation: \sum_{j \in V,\, j \neq i} x_{ij} = 1 \quad \forall i \in V

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(x[i, j] for j in range(n) if j != i) == 1 for i in range(n))

constraints.description: Each city has exactly one incoming arc in the tour.
constraints.formulation: \sum_{i \in V,\, i \neq j} x_{ij} = 1 \quad \forall j \in V

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(x[i, j] for i in range(n) if i != j) == 1 for j in range(n))

constraints.description: MTZ subtour elimination: if arc i→j is used among non-depot cities, city j must immediately follow city i in the tour ordering.
constraints.formulation: u_i - u_j + n \cdot x_{ij} \leq n - 1 \quad \forall i, j \in V \setminus \{0\},\; i \neq j

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(u[i] - u[j] + n * x[i, j] <= n - 1 for i in range(1, n) for j in range(1, n) if i != j)

constraints.description: Depot position is fixed to 1 to anchor the tour ordering.
Two-City Detour Elimination (EC3): eliminates infeasible two-city detours through the depot for any pair of non-depot cities i, j.
constraints.formulation: x_{j0} + x_{ji} + u_j - u_i - 1 \leq (n-1)(2 - x_{0i} - x_{ij}) \quad \forall i, j \in V \setminus \{0\},\; i \neq j

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(x[j, 0] + x[j, i] + u[j] - u[i] - 1 <= (n - 1) * (2 - x[0, i] - x[i, j]) for i in range(1, n) for j in range(1, n) if i != j)

objective.description: Minimize the total travel cost of the Hamiltonian cycle.
objective.formulation: \min \sum_{i \in V} \sum_{j \in V,\, j \neq i} c_{ij} \cdot x_{ij}

code.gurobipy: model.setObjective(gp.quicksum(c[i][j] * x[i, j] for i in range(n) for j in range(n) if i != j), GRB.MINIMIZE)
